arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Maresca gives hugely positive injury update ahead of run-in
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca believes the return of his injured Chelsea stars will provide a huge boost for the run-in to the season. Benoit Badiashile and Trevoh Chalobah both travelled to Denmark for the first leg of the Conference League round of 16 tie against Copenhagen. Badiashile has not played since early December after picking up an […] The post Chelsea boss Maresca gives hugely positive injury update ahead of run-in appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ace dealt major injury blow as transfer plans ruined and £15m summer twist explained
arts.sum: Gilchrist has played a big part in the run to this stage but has increased competition for his place after Wilder added Rob Holding to his ranks at the end of the January transfer window, meaning United had six loan players in the team. After a promising start to life on loan, Alfie Gilchrist has seen his season come to a crashing halt.

arts.ttl: Badiashile returns as Palmer and Chalobah join Chelsea’s Conference League squad
arts.sum: Chelsea arrived in Denmark on Wednesday afternoon, with Benoit Badiashile and Cole Palmer among the squad for Thursday’s Uefa Conference League match against Copenhagen. Defender Badiashile is in a Blues squad for the first time since being sidelined by injury almost three months ago. arts.ttl: Chelsea officially reignite transfer talks for €25m wonderkid
arts.sum: Chelsea have formally revived their transfer talks with Gremio over Gabriel Mec, a second source has confirmed. Many Chelsea supporters will have forgotten all about Gremio teenager Gabriel Mec after the Blues failed to secure his signature last year, but the club certainly did not forget.
